case_title: EILEEN IBARRA VS. BRADFORD M. HESLA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBARRA, EILEEN AS TO DEFENDANT HESLA, BRADFORD M. AN INDIVIDUAL DBA THREE'S A CROWD TRADE CHECKING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
